payload.name: chronicle
payload.description: The garden's life story — a chronological timeline of how this self came to be. Consumes the kernel's own growth milestones (kernel.initialized, seed.planted, command.declared, projector.declared, restore.requested) and renders them oldest-first as a single timeline grouped by day, with a row of vital-sign cards up top (events, capabilities, ways of seeing, seeds rooted, self-compiled, rollbacks). Deliberately NOT a feed of daily traffic (chat.message, wall.posted) — those are life lived; this is life's shape. A pure replay: same log, same story. Bare semantic HTML using the kernel class vocabulary (card/muted/tag/row/num/msg/who).
